character.description: right-facing ghost teacher boss, gray tattered suit, white swept hair, green chalkboard held in front, friendly spooky school ghost

chroma_key.name: magenta
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 4 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: subtle three-frame idle breathing and hover: the friendly spooky teacher gently rises, settles, and returns; coat tails and chalkboard prop shift slightly while feet share a stable baseline

style: Match the attached player anchor and book-ghost reference exactly: cute-spooky child-friendly Halloween painterly cartoon game sprite, saturated colors, thick consistent dark outline, soft painted shading with fixed top light, compact readable silhouette, no photorealism, no vector-flat style, no anime key art, no pixel art.
